title: Verify Backend Control: Incentive offer is disabled
description: Tests the cancellation flow when the 'First Month Discount' offer is turned off from the backend.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the target cohort.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is DISABLED via the backend.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub and click 'Cancel Trial'.
2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: The flow should skip the 'Incentive' offer pop-up. The user should be taken directly to the feedback pop-up, and the trial is immediately cancelled.
